closed_reason: Turn 2 codex peer-verify independently reran C1-C5 on the sister worktree; all checkpoints passed without fixes, so the self-host report-assets contract is accepted.

contract_checkpoints.C1: PASS. sister HEAD=d97514e on branch main, live HEAD=d97514e detached, origin/main=d97514e49212d10b6ef8403b829f2612651a452c, merge-base=d97514e49212d10b6ef8403b829f2612651a452c.
contract_checkpoints.C2: PASS. pipeline/summarizer.py and site/vods/11688000/report.html both have 0 hits for https:// or @import. build_site.py includes assets/vendor/chart.umd.min.js in _copy_web_assets(), defines _rewrite_legacy_cdn_html + _copy_report_html, and build_site() uses _copy_report_html. publish.deploy.check._check_external_cdn skips assets/vendor only and still keeps cookie/absolute-path scans.
contract_checkpoints.C3: PASS. publish/web/assets/vendor/chart.umd.min.js sha256=08dfa4730571b23810c34fc39c5101461ecafca56c3f92caf4850509cb158f30, size=205488. Fresh build keeps ../../assets/vendor/chart.umd.min.js and no jsdelivr/google-font refs. Poisoned legacy output HTML is rewritten clean on copy. Vendor probe is excluded from external URL warnings (exit 0), top-level probe still fails strict with exit 2, and vendor cookie probe still fails with COOKIE LEAK exit 1.
contract_checkpoints.C4: PASS. python -m publish.deploy.check --site-dir ./site --strict exit 0. python -m publish.deploy.package --target all --clean --strict exit 0 and emits dist/deploy/cloudflare/site-upload.zip plus dist/deploy/github-pages/site-artifact.tar.gz, manifest.json, and checksums.txt. Archive grep finds 0 NID_AUT/NID_SES hits. Repackaging into two temp out-dirs yields identical sha256 values for both bundles.
contract_checkpoints.C5: PASS. experiments/self_host_report_assets_verify.py -> 6/6 PASS. experiments/deploy_package_verify.py --site-dir ./site -> 5/5 PASS. Independent http.server smoke returns 200 for /index.html, /vod.html, /vods/11688000/report.html, and /assets/vendor/chart.umd.min.js. Validate-DadPacket and Validate-Documents both PASS.

decisions: Turn 1: chart.js is vendored (publish/web/assets/vendor/chart.umd.min.js) rather than removed or rewritten -- it is the only runtime dependency the report HTML actually uses, and dropping the charts would regress UX.

Turn 1: Google Fonts @import is dropped in favor of a system font fallback stack. User explicitly permitted this trade-off in the session kickoff message. Korean fallback chain (Apple SD Gothic Neo, Malgun Gothic, 'Malgun Gothic' Korean alt, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif) preserves readability without shipping woff2 files.
Turn 1: relative path ../../assets/vendor/chart.umd.min.js is fixed because report.html always lives at site/vods/<video_no>/report.html. Works identically on Cloudflare Pages and GitHub Pages.

Turn 1: legacy output/<base>.html files (generated by the old summarizer with CDN URLs baked in) are rewritten at build time via _rewrite_legacy_cdn_html rather than by regenerating output/. Regeneration would cost tokens and runtime; rewriting is deterministic and pattern-scoped.

Turn 1: publish.deploy.check._check_external_cdn excludes assets/vendor/ because vendored minified payloads legitimately contain inert documentation URLs (chartjs.org, jsdelivr docs, color lib readme) that are not runtime fetches. Cookie-leak and absolute-path scans still cover vendor/ -- those checks have different risk profiles.
meta_improvements: Self-host slice unblocks --strict as the CI default for publish.deploy.check + publish.deploy.package. No more ad-hoc warning tolerance in deploy pipelines.
Turn 2 independently reran the poisoned legacy HTML, vendor-scope, cookie-on-vendor, archive-grep, and idempotent bundle probes before accepting the contract.
